creator: ch.parvanov@gmail.com
text:
Hi Steven, 

the hw.vga.textmode="1" didn't help at all. The result is the same , freeze at Freebsd menu with the logo. Only disable beastie works. 

The hardware is Supermicro X11-SSLF BIOS version 2.0 (01.06.2017) , 8 GB RAM with XEON CPU E3-1240 v5 @ 3.50 GHz. I tested it on another machine with the same specs, the result is the same. 

I attach screenshots where it freezes. 

Regards
